text.title: Scope-Creep Park List Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Scope-Creep Park List Template.

example.scenario: 60-min walkthrough of billing-portal v2; 5 off-scope ideas land. Facilitator parks each with acknowledgement line and revisit_gate=next-sprint-planning. At next sprint planning: 2 graduate to backlog, 1 to design-decision-log, 2 closed out-of-scope.
example.trace: r1-park-do-not-debate → r3-revisit-gate-explicit → r4-acknowledgement-line → r5-review-at-sprint-planning → park-list stored
